[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001110 4
1 00111100 4
2 11001111 6
3 00000000 a
4 01110001 4
5 00001110 3
6 10100111 5
7 10011110 5

12 21 10111111 7
23 32 11011111 7
34 43 11111111 a
45 54 11111111 a

67 76 01110001 4 match 4
70 07 01111111 7

13 31 11101111 7

71 17 11110111 7

37 73 11111111 a
